## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore
- [ ] refactor

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run dev` tested
- [ ] `npm run build` (if applicable)
- [ ] Screenshots/logs attached (if UI-related)

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Docs updated when needed
